objectives: Pull fresh data from the '{{source}}' connection into ~/.mindframe/vault.
Create new vault entities for objects not yet in the vault.
Update frontmatter on existing entities from source data — never overwrite body prose or manually-set fields.
Update CATALOG.md and commit the vault if it is a git repo.
instructions: Run /mindframe:sync {{source}} and report what was created or updated.
boundaries: Do not delete vault notes even if the source no longer lists the entity.
Do not overwrite body prose written by humans or agents.
If the sync skill is not available, report the error and exit — do not improvise a sync.
